chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-8558 of 2019 Aurangzaib & another Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 None for the petitioners. Mr. S. Samiullah Shah for respondent No.4. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019, which is over six years old. On the last date of hearing on 27.01.2020, which is over five years ago, a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners. Despite lapse of five years question as to maintainability of the petition is yet to be resolved. Despite lapse of five years learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition and even today none is present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition which is still subject to maintainability, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along pending application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
